name: Grand Banks Yachts Limited
summary: Grand Banks Yachts Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells luxury recreational motor yachts in the United States, Australia, and Europe. The company offers its yachts primarily under the Grand Banks and Palm Beach brand names. It also engages in the sale of new and previously-owned yachts, as well as boat brokerage activities. Grand Banks Yachts Limited was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Singapore.
